set_name: Down-Tempo Punk Bluegrass / Alien House Suite

tracks.title: Good Vibrations in a Burned Barn
arrangement: field-texture intro with public-domain source deck muted until cleared
banjo roll establishes hook over kick-free pulse
deep-house kick enters under mandolin chop
fiddle answer bends into granular sky
half-time punk break
final chorus with source deck slices if provenance approved

tracks.title: A.P. Carter in the Warehouse
arrangement: dobro hook alone
warehouse kick and sub enter
call-and-response between banjo and stab
bridge strips to voice, stomp, and bowed harmonic
return with doubled banjo/dobro riff

tracks.title: No Gods, No Masters, No Quantize
arrangement: count-off into unquantized banjo
kick locks after four bars
acid line mirrors bass roots
stop-time chorus
fiddle and spectral freeze outro

tracks.title: Possum Kingdom Afterhours
arrangement: drone and fiddle establish place
brush kit and dub chords pulse
banjo harmonics become granular particles
dobro swell chorus
long spatial fade with low-end discipline

tracks.title: The Ballad of the Broken Controller
tracks.key_center: B flat major with punk chromatic passing tones
arrangement: controller calibration noises become rhythm
banjo riff locks to glitch percussion
mandolin tremolo lifts refrain
breakdown exposes failed notes
final refrain stacks all traditional instruments over alien choir

tracks.title: Rail Yard Ghost in the Control Room
arrangement: operator preflight drone with source deck muted
AeroBand banjo calibration becomes forward-roll hook
house grid conductor locks kick, hats, and mandolin chop
call-response fiddle, guitar, and dobro orbit the hook
root motion limiter drops bass and sub under punk kit pushes
provenance sampler gate opens only on approved source stutters
alien sky freeze and spatial harmonic field bloom
one-take punk outro with bounded fills and rollback-safe stop
